concerns.text: Task T018 describes writing an edge‑list exporter but does not specify any verification mechanism (e.g., a unit or integration test) to confirm that `results/predicted_ppi_<species>.tsv` is correctly created and formatted.
Task T031 adds a false‑positive analysis module and a report file, yet no test or validation step is defined to ensure the module runs correctly and the report is generated with expected contents.

Task T032 requires extending documentation with a Poisson derivation, but there is no verification artifact (e.g., a documentation lint test or review checklist) to confirm the new content is present and accurate.

Task T033 creates a curated validation set and adds a calibration step, but no test is provided to verify that the validation set is correctly integrated and that `precision_at_1000` is computed as intended.
Task T034 updates the `evaluation_metrics.json` schema, yet there is no schema‑validation test or CI check to ensure the updated schema is applied and that downstream code conforms to it.
Task T035 adds a unit test for the validation set, but the test file path or expected behavior is not detailed, making it unclear how the test will be executed or what success criteria are.
Task T036 updates README and quickstart docs without specifying any verification (e.g., a documentation build test) to ensure the changes are correctly rendered and contain the new sections.
Task T037 runs a benchmark script and expects total wall‑clock time ≤ 6 h, yet no automated check or CI assertion is defined to enforce this performance constraint.
Task T038 adds a CI step to enforce reproducibility by re‑running the pipeline and diffing outputs, but the task does not define the exact CI command, comparison method, or pass/fail criteria.
Task T039 (code cleanup) lacks a concrete deliverable definition (e.g., a linting report) and does not include a verification step to confirm that dead imports are removed and type hints are present.

Task T040 (security hardening) specifies verifying HTTPS URLs and checksum verification, but no test or audit script is referenced to automatically validate that all external URLs meet these criteria.

Task T041 (reproducibility statement) requires adding a new documentation section, yet there is no verification artifact (e.g., a doc‑check test) to ensure the statement is present and correctly references the global `--seed` flag and artifact map.
